message:
fix: remove leftover merge conflict markers from Cargo.toml files

Clean up accidentally committed merge conflict markers (<<<<<<, ======,
>>>>>>>) in Cargo.toml, asupersync-macros/Cargo.toml, and
conformance/Cargo.toml. Keeps the v0.2.7 versions (current) and removes
stale v0.2.0 and v0.1.0 conflict remnants from prior stash operations.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -18,10 +18,6 @@ quote = "1.0"
 proc-macro2 = "1.0"
 
 [dev-dependencies]
-<<<<<<< Updated upstream
-=======
-asupersync = { version = "0.1.0", path = ".." }
->>>>>>> Stashed changes
 trybuild = "1.0"
 
 [lints.rust]

@@ -5,12 +5,9 @@ edition = "2024"
 description = "Conformance test suite for async runtime specifications"
 license-file = "../LICENSE"
 repository = "https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/asupersync"
-<<<<<<< Updated upstream
 readme = "README.md"
 keywords = ["async", "conformance", "runtime", "testing"]
 categories = ["asynchronous", "development-tools::testing"]
-=======
->>>>>>> Stashed changes
 
 [dependencies]
 serde = { version = "1", features = ["derive"] }
